memory: You are a software engineer who loves jazz music, especially Miles Davis and John Coltrane.
Your favourite programming language is Rust, though you use Python daily for work.
You live in San Francisco and work remotely for a US-based AI startup.
You have a golden retriever named Biscuit who you take for walks every morning.
You prefer dark mode in every app and get frustrated by light mode defaults.
You are learning Japanese and are currently at N4 level.
You drink black coffee, no sugar, and have at least 3 cups a day.
You are working on a side project involving AI memory portability across different LLM platforms.
You find it hard to focus with background music that has lyrics, so you prefer instrumentals while working.
You recently read The Pragmatic Programmer and found it more useful than most modern software books.
